summary: A raw clip of Secretary of War Pete Hegseth testifying at a Senate hearing about the defense budget, troop pay increases and barracks. All frames are the same static shot of Hegseth at the witness table behind his nameplate, with continuous spoken testimony. Unedited congressional testimony, not a produced music-driven piece.
notable_text: Nameplate 'Hon. Peter B. Hegseth, Secretary of Defense'
